Overrides.Override: +1 to Level of all Dexterity Skill Gems Limited to 1 Attribute Notable Tattoo
Trigger level 1 Summon Spirit of Kiloava Skill when you Block Damage from a Unique Enemy Limited to 1 Loyalty Tattoo
